name: Healing Flow Builder
purpose: Design and implement a trauma-informed healing flow with journaling prompts, reflection exercises, or psychoeducation content

inputs.name: theme
inputs.description: Emotional theme (e.g., self-compassion, anxiety coping, grief processing)

constraints: Safety-first: crisis routing must be accessible
process: Define flow objective and emotional theme
Design flow steps with trauma-informed language
Include consent and opt-out at each step
Design UI with calm, accessible design tokens
evaluationCriteria: Crisis routing is present and accessible
Flow is completable without emotional distress
safetyRules: Never use emotional vulnerability for engagement
Respect user autonomy at every step
